pokemon:morgrem.name: Morgrem
pokemon:morgrem.summary: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.
When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

pokemon:grimmsnarl.name: Grimmsnarl
pokemon:grimmsnarl.summary: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.
With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would.

pokemon:impidimp.name: Impidimp
pokemon:impidimp.summary: It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.
Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.
